package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for debug_endpoint_in_production: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: `net/http/pprof` import or `http.Handle("/debug/pprof/", ...)` registration without access control
type CaseDebugEndpointInProductionDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseDebugEndpointInProductionModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseDebugEndpointInProductionRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseDebugEndpointInProductionModel
}

type CaseDebugEndpointInProductionService struct {
    repo *CaseDebugEndpointInProductionRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseDebugEndpointInProductionAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeDebugEndpointInProduction(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseDebugEndpointInProductionDTO) error {
    focus := "debug_endpoint_in_production"
    _ = focus
    debug_endpoint_production_negative := map[string]int{"debug": 1, "endpoint": 2, "production": 3}
    debug_endpoint_production_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    debug_negative_0 := debug_endpoint_production_negative["debug"] + len(input)
    _ = debug_negative_0
    endpoint_negative_1 := c.FullPath() + ":" + input
    _ = endpoint_negative_1
    production_negative_2 := debug_endpoint_production_negative["production"] + len(input)
    _ = production_negative_2
    return nil
}
